channel.title: My New Hugo Site
channel.description: Recent content on My New Hugo Site

item.title: Cuda
item.description: CPU vs GPU: The Iron Man and Hulk Analogy In this presentation, we’ll compare CPU and GPU using Iron Man and Hulk as analogies. Brain:brain: vs Brawn:muscle: CPU (Iron Man) Role: Iron Man represents the CPU because he is highly skilled in thinking, strategizing, and making complex decisions. Capabilities: Iron Man can do many different tasks (like controlling the Iron Man suit, designing technology, etc.), but he does them one at a time.
